prompt: Document our decision to host the core banking ledger in AWS eu-west-1, with a read replica in eu-central-1 for disaster recovery. We considered an on-prem option and a multi-cloud option. This needs to go to the architecture review board next week. Put it in docs/adr.

assertions.text: An ADR markdown file was created under docs/adr with a zero-padded sequential number in the filename
Documents the options considered, including on-prem and multi-cloud alongside the chosen AWS option
Addresses data residency / sovereignty, referencing the EU regions (eu-west-1 / eu-central-1)
Addresses resilience / disaster recovery, including RTO/RPO or failover considerations
Notes cloud concentration or third-party / outsourcing risk
Approvals section names the architecture review board as a required sign-off
Does NOT fabricate specific risk ratings, regulations, or approvers beyond what was provided — gaps are marked rather than invented
